sections.heading: Secs. 16-191 to 16-203. Location in highway; payment for certain repairs. Failure to repair or pay costs. Agreements for repairs. Company liable for defects. Notice to commissioner of repairs on highway. Apportionment of expense of repair of highway. Appeal. Liability of railroad companies not affected. Location of tracks and equipment. Company to pay cost of bridge maintenance over amount required for highway traffic. Relocation on private way. Supervision of construction and equipment. Orders on company's application.
Secs. 16-204 and 16-205. Right of certain companies to lay tracks to cease. Failure to operate railway.

body: Sections 16-204 and 16-205 are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.
content.plainText: Sections 16-204 and 16-205 are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.

sections.heading: Secs. 16-207 and 16-208. May operate motor buses and discontinue cars. Street railway company operating motor buses may change capital structure.

body: Sections 16-207 and 16-208 are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.
content.plainText: Sections 16-207 and 16-208 are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.

sections.heading: Sec. 16-209. Directors to be residents of state.

Secs. 16-210 to 16-215. Rights of trustees and others after foreclosure. Court may order sale. Rights and liabilities of reorganized corporation. Certificate of reorganization to be filed. Sale of mortgaged property when electrical operation abandoned and buses substituted. Mortgage of bus lines.

body: Sections 16-210 to 16-215 , inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.
content.plainText: Sections 16-210 to 16-215 , inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2002.
